title: Highlight Blocks Command
description: Command to highlight a set of blocks to the user. Can be called repeatedly, supplying new blocks to show at one time with multiple calls. If Bulk ops are turned off, recommended a small number of items in blocks array with any one call.

duration.description: The number of seconds to highlight for. If not specified, defaults to 30 seconds. Any negative value for indefinitely.

carry.description: If this request is a continuation of a previous call. If `false`, resets currently highlighted blocks. Defaults to 'false'

beep.description: If you want this to beep when highlighted. Defaults to 'false'

storageBlocks.description: The array of storage blocks to be highlighted.

storageBlock.description: The block these settings are for

powerState.description: The power state of the lights. Defaults to 'ON' if omitted.

color.description: The color of the lights. Must be valid hex color string, or 'RAND' (for random color). I.e, '#FFFFFF'. Ignored if disabled in capabilities. Exclude to keep current setting if used in setting command.

brightness.description: The brightness setting of this light. Ignored if disabled in capabilities. Exclude to keep current setting if used in setting command.
